title: Clans Cooldowns
description:
This is a mod for the game mode Mineplex Clans

This mod uses regular expressions to grab the cooldowns for the various abilities on clans and champions and displays them as a HUD bottom right of your screen.

This is useful to see all your cooldowns
body:
